title: Tighten result canvas and inspector behavior
summary: Polish the result surface so media, science explanation, game content, scenario, and mission loop feel like one coherent product flow.
acceptance: Generated media, explanation, and mission sections have clear hierarchy and no dead space.
The inspector stays useful on desktop and collapses cleanly on smaller viewports.
The page no longer feels like generic AI scaffolding.
notes: Completed after reducing header height, compressing the source column, moving the action bar upward, and enabling partial-result UI behavior.
